query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: Three parallel white contrails or light trails stretch diagonally from the lower left toward the upper right corner against a pitch-black background dotted with small white specks resembling distant stars, snow, or dust particles.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Three parallel, smeared and textureless white trails stretch diagonally across a grain-speckled black void, their forms dissolving into soft-edged ambiguity without fine detail, the edges cropped abruptly at the frame boundaries so the lines appear severed and incomplete, creating an unresolved, fragmentary composition.
